learner_output: Je ne bois pas du cafe.
correct_target: Je ne bois pas de cafe.
why_wrong: After negation, the partitive article changes to de/d' in standard cases.
repair_hint: When you build a negative sentence, check the noun article immediately after pas.

learner_output: Quand j'ai ete petit, j'ai joue souvent dehors.
correct_target: Quand j'etais petit, je jouais souvent dehors.
why_wrong: The sentence describes background and repeated past habit, so imparfait is required.
repair_hint: Ask whether the action is background/habit or a completed event before choosing the tense.
